title: Immersive Interfaces - Armor Hud Support
description: Changes UI for the mod Armor Hud by SaolGhra to match Immersive Interfaces
body:
# Immserive Interfaces X Armor Hud
Super simple pack that changes the Armor Hud texture to match Immersive Interfaces

**[SaolGhra's Armor Hud Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-hud)**

**[Shrimpsnail's Immersive Interfaces](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shrimps-immersive-interfaces)**


![hotbar with this pack image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BDQO8yKp/images/6fb0cf8da6d85638132e24f0b14d5fceb5ad30c5.png)

[ ![Full screenshot from SafeSpace ModPack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I1fy21k5/images/67c3a99a8cc0d1ab5ebd81175165aeeac89ce108.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/safespace)
Made for my modpack SafeSpace
